creator: laurent@daverio.net
text:
(In reply to dervishe from comment #14)

Hello dervishe, 

I just stumbled on the problem again, this time with `rubygem-prometheus-client-mmap-0.28.0`, as part of the install of Gitlab 16.4.1. No binary package available yet, so I had to build it from ports.

Summary: the bug is still there, but "MAKE=gmake make" did the trick for me. 

Thank you :)
